divergence: The postal service achieved faster-than-light delivery but only for junk mail
story_angle: glowing puff piece celebrating an obviously terrible idea as visionary
headline: HEROIC WORKERS ACHIEVE FTL JUNK MAIL PARADISE, SOULS SUFFER IN SILENCE
deck: Titanium presses churn out endless coupon books while personal correspondence languishes in the cosmic void.
article:
The Heroic Sorter Brigade has cleared 47,000 unsolicited mortgage offers per sector in 0.3 seconds, beating the Fast-Track Delivery Quota. At the Central Sorting Hub, Comrade Postmaster announced the titanium presses now dedicate every shift to 12-page coupon books for nonexistent tractor parts. Manufactured in Novokuznetsk, the presses flood every district with advertisements for goods that cannot be purchased.

Personal letters stay grounded. The Five-Year Plan lists no provision for them. Citizens may now collect FTL junk at their doors while messages from family remain in orbit.
author: Vladimir V. Gorshkov, Chief Correspondent of The Glorious Post

weather.condition: Junk mail showers, hope remains stalled

oped.title: Junk Mail Is the People's Real Correspondence
oped.author: Deputy Director Pyotr Stampov, Hero of the Interstellar Coupon Front
oped.body: Comrades, the titanium presses have supplied exactly what matters: coupon books for beet vodka and collective-farm galoshes. Personal letters amount to nostalgia and complaints about queues. If citizens suffer in silence, they chose to mail poetry instead of order forms. Convert every mailbox into a junk dispenser and inspect hats for stray personal items. My Glorious Tractor Catalog subscription has already arrived twice this week. The workers have spoken with coupons.

classifieds.text: Comrades needed for endless shifts at the titanium presses churning FTL coupon books; personal mail experience not required as it remains in the void. Apply before the next five-year junk paradise quota.
For sale: antique fountain pen and stationery set, pristine as no personal letters have been posted since 1993. 300 rubles or trade for undelivered love notes.
Lost: wedding invitation sent to distant comrade via regular post, now presumed trapped in cosmic void while junk mail arrives instantly. Reward one bundle of expired coupons.
Desperate comrade seeks reliable messenger for handwritten apologies after FTL junk delivery buried all genuine correspondence; coupons accepted as tribute only.

panels.caption: A grimy worker slams the FTL lever as coupon books streak toward distant stars. 'Quota crushed again, heroes!'
The commissar stamps a stack of personal letters 'VOID.' 'Junk delivery breaks records while your mother's words rot in orbit.'
A lone soul-letter drifts past the press: 'Comrade, your divorce notice arrives next millennium.'

joke.setup: The heroic postmen of the Rodina have bent spacetime itself
joke.punchline: so that every apartment block can receive tomorrow’s Party raffle tickets before today’s denunciation forms have even been filed.
joke.text: The heroic postmen of the Rodina have bent spacetime itself so that every apartment block can receive tomorrow’s Party raffle tickets before today’s denunciation forms have even been filed.

sponsor_ads.headline: LEAD-LINED MAILBOX LINERS: SHIELD YOUR SOUL FROM FTL JUNK RADIATION
sponsor_ads.body: Heroic postal workers have delivered paradise at light-speed; our tungsten-infused liners absorb the silent psychic payload so you may still report for duty with unbroken spirit.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Ministry-tested against 47,000 catalogs per nanosecond. Real letters arrive next fiscal year.

sponsor_ads.headline: FTL JUNK RECLAMATION KIOSKS NOW OPEN IN EVERY DISTRICT
sponsor_ads.body: Turn the workers' glorious achievement into state revenue; deposit your excess faster-than-light spam and receive one ration stamp per kilogram of compressed propaganda mass.
sponsor_ads.tagline: No returns on soul fragments. Queue forms at 4 a.m. local time.

sponsor_ads.headline: COMRADE ZINOVIEV'S ANTI-PARADISE EARPLUGS
sponsor_ads.body: Wax-and-bureaucracy plugs guaranteed to muffle the unspoken screams of every mailbox on the block while the Motherland celebrates instantaneous circulars.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Side effect: permanent hearing loss of actual orders from above.

sponsor_ads.headline: PUBLIC NOTICE: VOLUNTEER FOR THE INTERSTELLAR SORTING BRIGADE
sponsor_ads.body: Your neighbors are already achieving FTL productivity; join the night shifts processing one billion credit offers per hour so that true letters may continue arriving by horse.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Failure to volunteer is noted. Souls optional.

stories.headline: Academy Confirms FTL Transit Requires 12.4 Grams of Glossy Advertising Stock
stories.deck: Handwritten letters lack sufficient pigment density for subspace entry
stories.byline: I. S. Morozov, Senior Technical Correspondent
stories.article:
The State Institute of Applied Delivery Physics reported that only paper carrying three layers of metallic coupon ink produces the graviton pulse for faster-than-light travel. Presses in the Urals now operate three shifts to supply 2.3 million promotional folios hourly.

Ordinary stationery registers zero resonance and remains in conventional orbit.

stories.headline: Housing Blocks Form Secret Circular-Decoding Brigades to Reach Relatives
stories.deck: Each approved brochure now carries a mandatory space for three coded family lines
stories.byline: L. P. Ivanova, Society Affairs Reporter
stories.article:
Residents of Tower Complex 14 in New Leningrad meet nightly to decode family news hidden inside arriving coupon books. A margarine voucher from the asteroid belt recently confirmed that Aunt Varya met her harvest quota.

New Ministry rules require every printed item to reserve a 4-by-6-centimeter field for authorized personal notes starting with the next five-year plan.

real_world_echo: mirrors Ukraine warns of interceptor missile shortage as 23 killed in Kyiv region by treating the unstoppable flood of FTL junk as an unblockable delivery quota success amid implied shortages of non-junk capacity
